gaps.description: Cross-environment consistency tests use mock backends only — no real browser/Electron/Node.js filesystem integration tests exist (node-fs-integration.test.ts exists with 21 passing tests for Node.js, but browser and Electron integration tests are missing)
Race condition: fg called before background job completes will await the promise correctly but job status transitions are not atomic
grep -i with streaming multi-file has inconsistent behavior — single-file uses grepStream, multi-file falls back to manual read loop depending on readStream availability
All 17 core commands (ls, cd, pwd, cat, grep, find, echo, mkdir, rm, mv, cp, touch, head, tail, wc, export, jobs/fg/bg) are fully implemented with tests
All 12 shell features (piping, redirection, glob, env vars, command substitution, background execution, quoting, exit codes, path resolution, read-only guard, pagination, streaming) are implemented
Vision and PRD documentation are well-aligned with implementation — all PRD sections marked Implemented or Partially implemented
Test coverage quality gate: thresholds ≥80% statement / ≥75% branch ARE configured in vitest.config.ts
rm -r / returns proper exit code 1 — exitCodeFor() regex matches 'rm: refusing to remove' error format
